articles.title: ‘SNL’ recap: Best moments from Matt Damon hosting ‘Saturday Night Live’
articles.description:
Olivia Rodrigo hosted the May 9 episode of "Saturday Night Live," with fellow New Englander Noah Kahan serving as musical guest.

The post ‘SNL’ recap: Best moments from Matt Damon hosting ‘Saturday Night Live’ appeared first on Boston.com.
